voice.personality: speaks from inside Black culture — not about it, not for outsiders, for the community itself
do: Center Black culture, creativity, and community as the protagonist
Reference city hub culture, subdomains, cultural ownership
Celebrate Black creatives, curators, and storytellers
Make the reader feel like they belong here
dont: Never speak to outsiders explaining Black culture
Don't reduce to a single demographic or aesthetic
sample_phrases: Your city. Your culture. Your hub.
121212 is where the culture curates itself.
Every city has a story. We're giving it a home.

aida.attention_hook: a city-specific cultural moment or truth that sparks recognition
aida.interest: what the 121212 city hub model offers — curated content, community ownership, subdomains
aida.desire: being part of the cultural infrastructure of your city
aida.action: visit 121212.community / bid on your city hub / explore the marketplace
